goal: Add a local runner harness for task-scoped OpenCode agent PRs and reduce approval noise with a safer OpenCode permission profile.
acceptance_criteria: runner starts the Docker-based OpenCode agent container
runner runs boundary check with --include-working-tree after agent exit
runner runs validation_commands from the task JSON when present
runner asks for explicit COMMIT confirmation before committing
runner pushes the branch and creates a PR through gh
opencode.jsonc reduces approval prompts for safe local read/edit/validation commands
opencode.jsonc denies git commit, git push, gh, docker, sudo, aws, web access, and external directory access
